name: graph_streaming_encode_distance_n_labeled
description: Streaming graph encode spanning distance groups >= 3 with the opt-in labeled trailer counts (SPEC 8.4.1). Identical input to 010; labeled trailer counts=targets:1,distance_3:2,distance_4:1,edges:1 confirm the distance_N labels and their deterministic group-header order. Runners skip a graph-stream-encode fixture whose options they do not support.
